{{Quote|Meet my friend Vourk at the starport, he'll tell you what's going on.|[[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:BO" />}}
'''Vourk ver'Zremp''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] who was on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. He worked for [[Jabba's criminal empire/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure's criminal empire]].

==Biography==
{{Quote|The Empire thinks you're something special. That's enough to get Jabba's interest. You also were rescued by Han Solo, someone Jabba has a burning interest in. Jabba figures one way or another, you're a gold mine that just fell into his lap.|Vourk ver'Zremp, to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:BO" />}}
Vourk ver'Zremp worked in [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]] with [[Reimos Taligg]]<ref name="SWG:BO" /> and [[Niko Brehe]],<ref name="SWG:SW">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=class|Legacy|Short Walk|Tatooine}}</ref> under the orders of [[Bib Fortuna/Legends|Bib Fortuna]]. He was a friend of [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and was acquainted with [[Trehla Keelo]].<ref name="SWG:BO" /> Vourk also acted as intermediary between [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] and the [[Mayor/Legends|mayor]] of Mos Eisley, [[Mikdanyell Guh'rantt]].<ref name="SWG:IIH">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=class|Legacy|If It Helps|Tatooine}}</ref> In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]],<ref name="SWG_timeline">{{SWG_timeline}}</ref> a spacer wanted by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] landed in Mos Eisley with Han Solo. Solo advised the spacer to work for Jabba the Hutt and introduced him to Vourk ver'Zremp.<ref name="SWG:BO" /> Vourk requested the spacer to help Mayor Mikdanyell Guh'rantt, who was indebted to Jabba, with various tasks.<ref name="SWG:IIH" /> He then tasked the spacer to work with Niko Brehe.<ref name="SWG:SW" />

==Behind the scenes==
Vourk ver'Zremp appeared as a [[Wikipedia:Non-player character|non-player character]] in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG:BO" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref> Vourk ver'Zremp was added to the game as part of the "[[W:c:swg:Legacy Quest|Legacy Quest]]" with the release of the "[[W:c:swg:Publish 25 Notes for November 15, 2005|Publish 25]]," a.k.a. the "[[W:c:swg:New Game Enhancements|New Game Enhancements]]," on [[November 15]], [[2005]].<ref name="SonyCite-Publish Archive 2005">{{SonyCite|url=players/content.vm?id=64886&resource=publish|text=Publish Archive 2005}}</ref>
